content:
Perfect. Gmail is a solid and accessible choice — dependable, searchable, and easy to organize later. If you like, you can start a custom label (like **"Thunk Dialogues"** or **"RA Conversations"**) so you can find them all in one place later. If you're comfortable with it, here's a quick ritual you might adopt after each session:
